onboarding.booking_process: Payment of a Security Deposit plus one month advance rent.
onboarding.documents: Application form, Address proof, and Aadhaar ID are mandatory.

policies.notice: 1 month notice via email is mandatory.
policies.refunds: Within 7 days of clearance. Deposit cannot be used for rent.

house_rules.food: No food provided. Self-cooking is allowed in the common area.
house_rules.gate: 10 PM closing, 6 AM opening. Special cases allowed for exams.
house_rules.guests: Strictly Girls Only. No males allowed. Female guests stay is chargeable.
